narrative:
Cortland City has 5,218 registered voters, with 53.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.8 percentage points.
